entities.summary: Root Mean Square Layer Normalization — simpler alternative to LayerNorm

detail.name: RMSNorm
detail.description: Normalizes by RMS of activations without mean subtraction. Fewer ops than LayerNorm, similar quality.
detail.why: RMSNorm is standard in modern LLMs (LLaMA, Qwen) — simpler and faster than full LayerNorm

teaches.explain: LayerNorm: subtract mean, divide by std. RMSNorm: just divide by RMS (root mean square). Saves the mean computation. Works equally well in practice.
teaches.rationale: Used here because: RMSNorm is standard in modern LLMs (LLaMA, Qwen) — simpler and faster than full LayerNorm

teaches.explain: Prevents activations from growing/shrinking across layers. Stabilizes training. Enables higher learning rates.
teaches.rationale: Used here because: RMSNorm is standard in modern LLMs (LLaMA, Qwen) — simpler and faster than full LayerNorm

entities.summary: Store learnable scale parameter and epsilon

detail.name: __init__
detail.description: Creates weight parameter (scale) initialized to ones. Epsilon prevents division by zero.

teaches.explain: After normalizing to unit RMS, multiply by learnable weight. Allows network to undo normalization where needed. Per-dimension scaling.
teaches.rationale: Creates weight parameter (scale) initialized to ones

entities.summary: Standalone RMS normalization without residual fusion

detail.name: rms_forward
detail.description: Compute x / sqrt(mean(x²) + eps) * weight. Pure normalization path.

teaches.explain: RMS = sqrt(mean(x²)). Normalize: x_norm = x / RMS. Simpler than std (no mean subtraction needed). Numerically stable with epsilon.

detail.name: add_rms_forward
detail.description: Combines x = x + residual and normalization in one pass. Saves memory bandwidth.

teaches.explain: Combine residual add and normalization into one kernel. Reads input once instead of twice. Saves memory bandwidth — the bottleneck for normalization ops.
teaches.rationale: Combines x = x + residual and normalization in one pass

detail.perf: Memory-bandwidth bound op — fusion halves memory traffic

entities.summary: Dispatch to fused or unfused normalization based on residual presence

detail.name: forward
detail.description: If residual tensor provided, uses fused path. Otherwise plain RMS normalization.

teaches.explain: Choose optimized code path based on runtime conditions. Fused kernel when possible, fallback otherwise. Common optimization strategy.
teaches.rationale: If residual tensor provided, uses fused path
